Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Agreement.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Agreement.Builder
Enclosing class:
Agreement
public static final class Agreement.Builder extends Object

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Agreement.Builder
    affirmationTime(OffsetDateTime affirmationTime)
    The time recorded relating to when a given agreement is `AFFIRMED` by the Customer; This is set to the time when the affirmation is processed by AFS
    Agreement.Builder
    affirmationTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> affirmationTime)
    The time recorded relating to when a given agreement is `AFFIRMED` by the Customer; This is set to the time when the affirmation is processed by AFS
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementId(String agreementId)
    An Apex-generated identifier used to reference a single legal agreement associated with the account
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementId(Optional<String> agreementId)
    An Apex-generated identifier used to reference a single legal agreement associated with the account
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementName(String agreementName)
    The friendly name of the agreement; Typically mirrors the enrollment it is attached to (e.g., `LENDING_FULLY_PAID_STOCK_LOAN`)
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementName(Optional<String> agreementName)
    The friendly name of the agreement; Typically mirrors the enrollment it is attached to (e.g., `LENDING_FULLY_PAID_STOCK_LOAN`)
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementSource(AgreementSource agreementSource)
    An internal indicator from where the agreement was generated; Typically `ACCOUNTS_SERVICE` if accessing our public APIs
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementSource(Optional<? extends AgreementSource> agreementSource)
    An internal indicator from where the agreement was generated; Typically `ACCOUNTS_SERVICE` if accessing our public APIs
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementState(AgreementState agreementState)
    The status of an agreement which blocks an enrollment; `REQUIRED` if not yet received, or `AFFIRMED` if acknowledgement has been received by AFS
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementState(Optional<? extends AgreementState> agreementState)
    The status of an agreement which blocks an enrollment; `REQUIRED` if not yet received, or `AFFIRMED` if acknowledgement has been received by AFS
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementUri(String agreementUri)
    A URI referencing a static PDF containing the legalese of a given agreement; All agreements of the same nature link to the same publicly-available PDF.
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementUri(Optional<String> agreementUri)
    A URI referencing a static PDF containing the legalese of a given agreement; All agreements of the same nature link to the same publicly-available PDF.
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementVersion(String agreementVersion)
    An internal version number based on typographical revisions of the related agreement; Version numbers are automatically updated when new agreements are available and should be of no technical concern to the integrator
    Agreement.Builder
    agreementVersion(Optional<String> agreementVersion)
    An internal version number based on typographical revisions of the related agreement; Version numbers are automatically updated when new agreements are available and should be of no technical concern to the integrator

    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single instance of an enrollment; Used to access the record after creation

      public Agreement.Builder affirmationTime(OffsetDateTime affirmationTime)
      The time recorded relating to when a given agreement is `AFFIRMED` by the Customer; This is set to the time when the affirmation is processed by AFS

      The time recorded relating to when a given agreement is `AFFIRMED` by the Customer; This is set to the time when the affirmation is processed by AFS

    • agreementVersion

      public Agreement.Builder agreementVersion(String agreementVersion)
      An internal version number based on typographical revisions of the related agreement; Version numbers are automatically updated when new agreements are available and should be of no technical concern to the integrator
